message:
feat(fcp-manifest): Add capability-ID lint rejecting network addressing patterns

Capability IDs must be abstract identifiers, not network addresses.
Add validation that rejects IDs containing URL schemes (http:, https:,
ws:, etc.), port numbers (:443, :8080), hostname TLD patterns
(*.com, *.org, etc.), and IPv4-like address segments. Applied to
both capabilities section and per-operation capability declarations.

Closes bd-rk6a, bd-2kt1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
